headline: 痴迷领跑今日热搜，福尔摩斯小姐3热度不减
headlineEn: Obsession Tops Today's Trends, Enola Holmes 3 Stays Hot
summary: 今日无新片上映，但本周新片《痴迷》登顶热搜，《福尔摩斯小姐3》持续火热。多部大片如《超级少女》《玩具总动员5》等蓄势待发。
summaryEn: No new releases today, but 'Obsession' tops trending charts this week, with 'Enola Holmes 3' still popular. Major titles like 'Supergirl' and 'Toy Story 5' are on the horizon.

topTrends.title: 无职转生：到了异世界就拿出真本事

industryHighlights.text: 本周《痴迷》持续霸榜，口碑发酵
industryHighlights.en: This week's 'Obsession' continues to dominate with strong word-of-mouth

industryHighlights.text: 《超级少女》定档消息引发粉丝热议
industryHighlights.en: Supergirl's release date sparks fan buzz

industryHighlights.en: The Devil Wears Prada 2 development progress revealed

industryHighlights.text: 《安昂传奇：最后的气宗》等大片即将来袭
industryHighlights.en: Big titles like 'Avatar: The Last Airbender' incoming
